query:
-- 3. Assigner le territoire Luxembourg à SaniDesign (partnerId=60015, regionId=60001)
INSERT INTO partner_territories (partnerId, regionId) 
VALUES (60015, 60001);

-- Vérifier l'assignation
SELECT pt.id, pt.partnerId, p.companyName, r.code, r.name as regionName, c.name as countryName
FROM partner_territories pt
JOIN partners p ON p.id = pt.partnerId
JOIN regions r ON r.id = pt.regionId
JOIN countries c ON c.id = r.countryId
WHERE pt.partnerId = 60015;
